## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] Secret scan reviewed
- [ ] README and README.tr updated when user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Forward-test prompts updated when runtime skill behavior changed

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, local config, logs, screenshots, archives, or AI state included
- [ ] Install or global-write behavior is dry-run capable
- [ ] Plugin and marketplace metadata remain least-privilege
